"[12] ^CT623 -- 1097, NEG VIS OF CHP ON THE NB SIDE / APPEARS THE RAILING HIT IS BEHIND K/RAIL // HE'S CIRCLING BACK TO SB SIDE FOR BETTER ACCESS"
"[11] ^CT623 WILL BE THERE AS SOON AS POSS / ONCE HE MAKES IT TO THE WB 8 IT SHOULD BE FREE FLOW"
"[9] [Notification] [CHP]-^CT623 LL -- HE'S STUCK IN HEAVY TRFC SB 163/GEN"
"[7] ^1039 CT623, WILL BE ENRT FOR BIRDGE INSPECTION / CPZ TMC WILL CHK PRIOR LOGS FOR TC'S IN THE AREA"
"[6] CT CPZ WHAT SOUNDS LIKE BRIDGE AND BRIDGE RAIL DMG FROM UNK TC "
"[4] ALSO INFO FOR THE LOG; GRAND AVE OFR GOES UNDERNEATH THE I-5, THERE IS A LIGHT POLE ON THE LHS OF THE OFR ITSELF, BUT NOT ONE OF THE I-5 OVER THE OFR "
"[1] PART OF THE BRIDGE COMING DOWN 15-20 FT FELL INTO THE LANE/ LIGHT POLE IS ALSO DOWN / IT CAME FROM THE OVERPASS ABOVE"

"[3] 113-56 W/ FSP BEHIND VEH IN CD WILL BE JNO CV [Shared]"
"[14] [Notification] [FSP]-FSP IS 97 EB 91 JWO IMP - REQ A BREAK TO START EB 91 JEO LV [Shared]"
"[6] 55-400 - RDWY CLR FSP HAS VEH IN TOW - ENRT TO PV /STEARNS [Shared]"
"[1] [1] ,,FSP FOR BLK BMW I4 IN CD - NEEDS A TOW OFF[Shared]"
"[35] 76-10 ENRT FROM SR62 ,INQ IF PRTYS NEED A BREAK /// R28 NEG FOR A BRESAK [Shared]"
"[30] [Appended, 11:36:26] [7] BLK MERZ AND BLK PK - POSS HV PRIOR TO TC [Shared]"
"[29] [Appended, 11:36:26] [6] [Notification] [CHP]-PER DUPE // BLK MERZ PULLED OVER ON RS - JWO BOB HOPE [Shared]"
"[26] [Appended, 11:36:26] [3] MERZ TC'D INTO BLK TRK - CAUSING BLK TRK TO TC INTO SEMI AND WHI KIA SOUL "
"[1] BLK PK , AND 2 SEMI , WHI SD "

Log.Location: "SR74 E EO / San Jacinto Av - SR79"

details.IncidentDetail: "[6] RP MADE CONTACT W/THE NEIGHBOR - ADMITTED TO THE TC BUT CLAIMED HE DIDN'T HAVE INSURANCE"
"[1] RP'S VEH WAS STREET PARKED AND SIDE SWIPED"
"[7] #2 LANE WILL BE CLOSED FROM MM105-108 "
"[2] EASTBOUND SR58 OFF RAMP TO BUSINESS ROUTE 58 CLOSED DUE TO EMERGENCY WORK"
"[1] WESTBOUND SR58 ON RAMP TO EXIT 165 CLOSED DUE TO EMERGENCY WORK"

"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG TO US395 // RESIDENTIAL ACCESS PERMITTED"
